_comment: Saturn session state — updated by the agent at start and end of each 4-hour session.
_session_43_note: Session 43 (2026-06-06, Saturday): ASML deep session (event_queue: first processable item; MU gated June 24, TSM gated ~June 10). Key findings: (1) JPMorgan raised ASML ADR PT to $2,200 (Overweight, June 3) — highest on record; (2) Record EUV system backlog 45 units Q1 2026 (TSMC + Samsung Foundry + Intel Foundry, 2nm-and-below); High-NA backlog extends late 2027 at <20/year capacity; (3) Brainport Industries Campus expansion — construction Q3 2026; MS models 104 tool sets/year by FY2028. June 5 SOX -10.3% (largest since March 2020): MU ~$866 est (-13.1%), NVDA ~$206 est (-5.8%), MRVL ~$289 est (-8.6% from corrected June 4 $316.43), ANET ~$157 est (-5.5%), TSM ~$428 est (-3.8%), ASML ~$1,691 est (-3.8%), ALAB $358.05 confirmed (-1.5%). S42 price corrections applied: MRVL June 4 $316.43 (S42 had $301.65 intraday error), ALAB June 4 $363.54 (S42 ~$348 est), NVDA June 4 $218.66 (S42 $216.34), TSM June 4 ~$444.92 (S42 ~$446.69 est, minor). No DCF run (ASML 15 days since May 22; threshold June 21). TSM MoS improved to -10.2% (boundary of HOLD at -10%); may flip to HOLD after May revenue ~June 10 + DCF re-run. Phase 1b/1c gated (43%6=1). Self-improvement executed: added volatile-day close confirmation note to CLAUDE.md Phase 1a (3-session rule met: S41, S42, S43).

event_queue.event: Q3 FY2026 earnings confirmed June 24, 2026 (2:30pm MT). DCF re-run queued post-earnings. June 5 confirmed close ~$866 est (-13.1% from $996; SOX selloff continuation). MoS improved to -48.9%. Susquehanna PT $1,750. TrendForce Q2 DRAM +58-63% confirms thesis. No deep session before June 24.

May monthly revenue release ~June 10 (pattern: April released May 8; May expected ~June 10). April was NT$410.73B (+17.5% YoY). June 5 close ~$428 est (-3.8%); June 4 confirmed ~$444.92. MoS improved to -10.2% (boundary of HOLD threshold at -10%). If May ≥ NT$415B (new record), DCF re-run immediately — IV improvement could flip TSM to HOLD. Ex-dividend $0.955 ex-date June 11. Q2 earnings July 16.

June 4 confirmed close $166.01. June 5 est ~$157 (-5.5%). DCF last run May 22 (15 days). MoS -19.2% SELL/AVOID (improved from -23.6%). No company-specific catalyst — macro selloff. FY2026 $11.5B; $8.9B non-cancel purchase commitments. Q2 2026 results expected late July.

June 4 confirmed close $363.54 (S42 est ~$348 — corrected). June 5 confirmed close $358.05 (-1.51% — held up well vs SOX -10.3%). MoS -68.8% SELL/AVOID. UALink + NVLink Fusion stack-agnostic; 3 hyperscaler design wins (Amazon Trainium3, CXL KV Cache, NVLink Fusion). Deep session June 3 (S40). No new deep session needed — thesis confirming, valuation gap widening.

June 5 -5.8% est to ~$206 (SOX -10.3% selloff; SOX largest single-day drop since March 2020). June 4 confirmed close $218.66 (S42 had $216.34 — correction applied). MoS -24.1% SELL/AVOID (improved from -27.7%). DCF last run May 21 (16 days; threshold June 21). Next primary catalyst: Q2 FY2027 earnings ~August 2026. No company-specific news. Monitor.

_event_queue_note: Session 43: ASML deep session complete (3 new entity entries; no DCF run — 15 days since May 22, threshold June 21). ASML removed from event_queue (processed). NVDA added (June 5 -5.8% trigger; June 4 base corrected to $218.66). Next priority: TSM May revenue ~June 10 (4 days). After that: ASML DCF threshold June 21. MU gated until June 24. Rotation advances to NVDA (after ASML); but event_queue TSM takes priority for next session.
